revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Four Heavenly Kings]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Four Heavenly Kings]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:四天王, en:Four Heavenly Kings); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/53619304 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) 仏教の天部も「柱」と数えるのでしょうか？[[利用者:Stanislaus|Stanislaus]] 09:11 2004年1月21日 (UTC) ==○○の四天王について== 歴史的な事項で個々の項目を立てるとどうもぼやけるので、統合しませんか?[[利用者:Sat.K|Sat.K]] 2005年6月6日 (月) 14:18 (UTC) この記事はネタですか（笑） [[利用者:無空|無空]] 2005年6月11日 (土) 14:20 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 記事統合 == [[四大天王]]の記述は、すでに四天王で言及されている情報を多く含むため。特に四大天王では主に本記事で言及されている「香港四天王」を指しているようです。--[[利用者:BitBucket|BitBucket]] 2006年2月22日 (水) 00:54 (UTC) *(コメント)[[四天王]]と[[四大天王]]の何を統合したいのか不明です。[[四天王]]は仏教関係とその他、[[四大天王]]は芸能関係としっかり分けて記述されてますが？あえて言うなら中国語版のように統合より分割するべきでは？[[利用者:219.37.104.10|219.37.104.10]] 2006年3月11日 (土) 14:38 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 広目天の眷属について == 広目天の眷属は、毘舎闍（持国天の眷属「毘舎遮」と同じ）ではなく、富單那では？ 那伽は龍神、で、問題無いとは思いますが、基本的に八部鬼衆での表記は那伽が多いかと思います。 :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1244470553 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} {{WikiProject China|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=Low}} }} {{merged-from|Guardians of Buddhism|date=9 December 2014}} ==Untitled== How different are the Four Heavenly Kings from the Chinese [[Ssu Ling]]? I know that the Ssu Ling take up four of the five Chinese cardinal directions. Can we link these two? [[User:Hulamoth|Hulamoth]] 18:59, 6 May 2006 (UTC) :Very different. One is a set of mythical creatures. The other a set of deities. [[User:Yiren|Yik Lin Khoo]] 14 Aug 2006 :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == spread to korea? == guess they were never popular there..--[[User:Dangerous-Boy|Dangerous-Boy]] 08:38, 8 May 2006 (UTC) I've added the Korean names. I'm not used to Hangul, so I hope I got the transcriptions correct! [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 22:39, 10 May 2006 (UTC) :try looking at this: [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (Korea-related articles)]]--[[User:Dangerous-Boy|Dangerous-Boy]] 22:13, 14 May 2006 (UTC) ::Thanks to Appleby for fixing up the Korean transcriptions and adding Hangul. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 12:12, 17 May 2006 (UTC) :::no prob, nice little article here. these statues are indeed standard in korean buddhist temples. fyi, your transcriptions weren't wrong, but wikipedia's korean naming convention is to use a different romanization system. [[User:Appleby|Appleby]] 17:04, 17 May 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Merge == I disagree with the proposal to merge "Four Heavenly Kings" with "Guardians of the Directions". The two groups are quite distinct, having only one member in common. "Guardians of the Directions" is a primarily Hindu grouping of deities, and "Four Heavenly Kings" is a Buddhist grouping (although also used in non- or semi-Buddhist Chinese mythology). :Definitely true. While the Si Tianwang seem to have their roots in Hinduism, they are different in several ways--for one, there aren't even the same number. [[User:Fearwig|Fearwig]] 05:33, 11 May 2006 (UTC) As far as I can tell, the Ssu Ling is a different group as well. Obviously, there is a common theme to the concept of areal guardians, but it's not restricted to Asian religions and mythologies; it might as well include [[Norðri, Suðri, Austri and Vestri]] or the four [[Archangel]]s. Perhaps it deserves a category of its own or even a list page, especially if there are several additional examples. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 11:20, 10 May 2006 (UTC) As there doesn't seem to be a persuasive reason for merging the articles, I'll remove the merge flag.[[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 17:47, 11 May 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Otogi== Does anyone know if these four 'Gods' (or the Hindu versions for that matter) represent the four generals in the Otogi video games? :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Mahabhuta== The following was inserted after a remark about the association of the four Heavenly Kings with colors and directions: , although they may correspond to the concept of [[Mahabhuta]] That may be so, but it would be helpful to have some supporting information. I don't recall any association either between the Four Heavenly Kings and the four elements, or between the four elements and the directions (or colors). If there is such an association made somewhere, it's certainly appropriate to mention it, but citation is desirable so that the connection can be asserted more confidently.[[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 20:10, 15 October 2006 (UTC) :Fair enough. I have heard of an association between the colors yellow, red, blue, and white in relation to the classical elements in Buddhism on friesian.com (http://www.friesian.com/elements.htm), although I am not sure whether or not this is just thier opinion. [[User:66.24.236.62|66.24.236.62]] 01:41, 16 October 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Devanagari== The Devanagari spellings used here are in serious error. They read: * Vaisravaṇa for Vaiśravaṇa * Kubhera for Kubera (and wrong form of "e" used) * Virūdhaka for Virūḍhaka * Dhrtarāśtra for Dhṛtarāṣṭra * Virupākśa for Virūpākṣa * Nothing for Vessavaṇa * Kuverā for Kuvera (wrong "e" again) * Virūlhaka for Virūḷhaka * Dhatarāththa for Dhatarattha * Virūpākhkha for Virūpakkha These are not minor mistakes. Unfortunately, I do not have the technical capacity to correct them, so I am commenting them out until they are fixed. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 15:06, 30 May 2007 (UTC) Also, using devanagari for Pali is arbitrary. It was never used before the 19th century, & is less used today than several other scripts. [[User:Peter jackson|Peter jackson]] ([[User talk:Peter jackson|talk]]) 08:35, 25 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Pokemon? == Should it be noted that in Pokemon,the japanese name for the Elite Four is "Four Heavenly Kings"? 17:10, 24 June 2009 (UTC) Perhaps if an 'in popular culture' section were added? Sailor Moon's first story arc (in most versions) also contained a group of characters named the Shitennou/Four Heavenly Kings, and there are likely more examples in other stories. [[Special:Contributions/67.252.14.109|67.252.14.109]] ([[User talk:67.252.14.109|talk]]) 13:02, 11 March 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Mnemonic == The Mnemonic is unsourced, and a google search reveals only [http://www.google.com/search?q=F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n+memnonic&sourceid=ie7&rls=com.microsoft:en-us:IE-SearchBox&ie=&oe=&safe=active#hl=en&safe=active&tbo=d&rls=com.microsoft:en-us%3AIE-SearchBox&sclient=psy-ab&q=%22F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n%22+mnemonic+tune&oq=%22F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n%22+mnemonic+tune&gs_l=serp.3...3282.4032.1.4157.2.2.0.0.0.0.187.187.0j1.1.0.les%3B..0.0...1c.1.HT5ioJTcfZk&pbx=1&bav=on.2,or.r_gc.r_pw.r_qf.&fp=2b72666ff0e4cc03&bpcl=39650382&biw=740&bih=231 copies of this article]. In addition, it mixes Chinese and English words, so it carries the scent of "hey, I messed with words on the internet and got something to kind of match." In addition, the paragraph pointing at the Wu Xing article does not point out which associations are used on the Four Heavenly Kings, and reads as synthesis or worse, fanfiction, rather than reporting what any sources have said.[[User:KrytenKoro|Not even Mr. Lister's]] [[User_talk:KrytenKoro|Koromon survived intact.]] 16:05, 6 December 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External Links== *[http://japanesesymbolsofpresence.com/four%20heavenly%20kings.html The inner meaning of The Four Heavenly Kings] — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Walthersell|Walthersell]] ([[User talk:Walthersell|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Walthersell|contribs]]) 05:22, 12 April 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Tibetan == I'm not sure why we are prizing the appearance of the Tibetan alphabet, but there's no need to revert all the edits just to add four lines back in. THL is the romanisation of choice for pronunciation needs. The other definitions are legitimate: they are local pronunciations of the Sanskrit or Pali terms. [[User:Ogress|'''Ogress''']] [[User_Talk:Ogress|''smash!'']] 18:03, 31 May 2015 (UTC) :Also, the issue of is popping up; do we need to convert to {{gallery}}? Honestly I'm slightly intimidated but maybe I'll take a crack at it. :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == "Popular culture" == The "popular culture" section on this page seems to me to fall foul of [[MOS:POPCULT]], since 四天王 [https://legendsoflocalization.com/tricky-translations-2-the-four-heavenly-kings/ gets used in Japan to refer in general to groups of four things]. I had a go at writing something up about this to replace the existing list, but I wasn't confident in my ability to summarise in a way which clearly added to the article rather than just seeming like someone who's salty because they don't like Sailor Moon or whatever. [[Special:Contributions/176.27.87.86|176.27.87.86]] ([[User talk:176.27.87.86|talk]]) 18:59, 5 December 2019 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Baybayin == Is there any source for where the baybayin and "Tagalized" names come from? Because if they're simply Tagalized without anything, it has no place in this page. [[User:RayaOstrinsula|RayaOstrinsula]] ([[User talk:RayaOstrinsula|talk]]) 09:14, 7 September 2024 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/53619304 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) 仏教の天部も「柱」と数えるのでしょうか？[[User:Stanislaus|Stanislaus]] 09:11 2004年1月21日 (UTC) ==○○の四天王について== 歴史的な事項で個々の項目を立てるとどうもぼやけるので、統合しませんか?[[User:Sat.K|Sat.K]] 2005年6月6日 (月) 14:18 (UTC) この記事はネタですか（笑） [[User:無空|無空]] 2005年6月11日 (土) 14:20 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 記事統合 == [[四大天王]]の記述は、すでに四天王で言及されている情報を多く含むため。特に四大天王では主に本記事で言及されている「香港四天王」を指しているようです。--[[User:BitBucket|BitBucket]] 2006年2月22日 (水) 00:54 (UTC) *(コメント)[[四天王]]と[[四大天王]]の何を統合したいのか不明です。[[四天王]]は仏教関係とその他、[[四大天王]]は芸能関係としっかり分けて記述されてますが？あえて言うなら中国語版のように統合より分割するべきでは？[[User:219.37.104.10|219.37.104.10]] 2006年3月11日 (土) 14:38 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 広目天の眷属について == 広目天の眷属は、毘舎闍（持国天の眷属「毘舎遮」と同じ）ではなく、富單那では？ 那伽は龍神、で、問題無いとは思いますが、基本的に八部鬼衆での表記は那伽が多いかと思います。 :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1244470553 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} {{WikiProject China|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=Low}} }} {{merged-from|Guardians of Buddhism|date=9 December 2014}} ==Untitled== How different are the Four Heavenly Kings from the Chinese [[Ssu Ling]]? I know that the Ssu Ling take up four of the five Chinese cardinal directions. Can we link these two? [[User:Hulamoth|Hulamoth]] 18:59, 6 May 2006 (UTC) :Very different. One is a set of mythical creatures. The other a set of deities. [[User:Yiren|Yik Lin Khoo]] 14 Aug 2006 :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == spread to korea? == guess they were never popular there..--[[User:Dangerous-Boy|Dangerous-Boy]] 08:38, 8 May 2006 (UTC) I've added the Korean names. I'm not used to Hangul, so I hope I got the transcriptions correct! [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 22:39, 10 May 2006 (UTC) :try looking at this: [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (Korea-related articles)]]--[[User:Dangerous-Boy|Dangerous-Boy]] 22:13, 14 May 2006 (UTC) ::Thanks to Appleby for fixing up the Korean transcriptions and adding Hangul. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 12:12, 17 May 2006 (UTC) :::no prob, nice little article here. these statues are indeed standard in korean buddhist temples. fyi, your transcriptions weren't wrong, but wikipedia's korean naming convention is to use a different romanization system. [[User:Appleby|Appleby]] 17:04, 17 May 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Merge == I disagree with the proposal to merge "Four Heavenly Kings" with "Guardians of the Directions". The two groups are quite distinct, having only one member in common. "Guardians of the Directions" is a primarily Hindu grouping of deities, and "Four Heavenly Kings" is a Buddhist grouping (although also used in non- or semi-Buddhist Chinese mythology). :Definitely true. While the Si Tianwang seem to have their roots in Hinduism, they are different in several ways--for one, there aren't even the same number. [[User:Fearwig|Fearwig]] 05:33, 11 May 2006 (UTC) As far as I can tell, the Ssu Ling is a different group as well. Obviously, there is a common theme to the concept of areal guardians, but it's not restricted to Asian religions and mythologies; it might as well include [[Norðri, Suðri, Austri and Vestri]] or the four [[Archangel]]s. Perhaps it deserves a category of its own or even a list page, especially if there are several additional examples. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 11:20, 10 May 2006 (UTC) As there doesn't seem to be a persuasive reason for merging the articles, I'll remove the merge flag.[[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 17:47, 11 May 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Otogi== Does anyone know if these four 'Gods' (or the Hindu versions for that matter) represent the four generals in the Otogi video games? :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Mahabhuta== The following was inserted after a remark about the association of the four Heavenly Kings with colors and directions: , although they may correspond to the concept of [[Mahabhuta]] That may be so, but it would be helpful to have some supporting information. I don't recall any association either between the Four Heavenly Kings and the four elements, or between the four elements and the directions (or colors). If there is such an association made somewhere, it's certainly appropriate to mention it, but citation is desirable so that the connection can be asserted more confidently.[[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 20:10, 15 October 2006 (UTC) :Fair enough. I have heard of an association between the colors yellow, red, blue, and white in relation to the classical elements in Buddhism on friesian.com (http://www.friesian.com/elements.htm), although I am not sure whether or not this is just thier opinion. [[User:66.24.236.62|66.24.236.62]] 01:41, 16 October 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Devanagari== The Devanagari spellings used here are in serious error. They read: * Vaisravaṇa for Vaiśravaṇa * Kubhera for Kubera (and wrong form of "e" used) * Virūdhaka for Virūḍhaka * Dhrtarāśtra for Dhṛtarāṣṭra * Virupākśa for Virūpākṣa * Nothing for Vessavaṇa * Kuverā for Kuvera (wrong "e" again) * Virūlhaka for Virūḷhaka * Dhatarāththa for Dhatarattha * Virūpākhkha for Virūpakkha These are not minor mistakes. Unfortunately, I do not have the technical capacity to correct them, so I am commenting them out until they are fixed. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 15:06, 30 May 2007 (UTC) Also, using devanagari for Pali is arbitrary. It was never used before the 19th century, & is less used today than several other scripts. [[User:Peter jackson|Peter jackson]] ([[User talk:Peter jackson|talk]]) 08:35, 25 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Pokemon? == Should it be noted that in Pokemon,the japanese name for the Elite Four is "Four Heavenly Kings"? 17:10, 24 June 2009 (UTC) Perhaps if an 'in popular culture' section were added? Sailor Moon's first story arc (in most versions) also contained a group of characters named the Shitennou/Four Heavenly Kings, and there are likely more examples in other stories. [[Special:Contributions/67.252.14.109|67.252.14.109]] ([[User talk:67.252.14.109|talk]]) 13:02, 11 March 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Mnemonic == The Mnemonic is unsourced, and a google search reveals only [http://www.google.com/search?q=F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n+memnonic&sourceid=ie7&rls=com.microsoft:en-us:IE-SearchBox&ie=&oe=&safe=active#hl=en&safe=active&tbo=d&rls=com.microsoft:en-us%3AIE-SearchBox&sclient=psy-ab&q=%22F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n%22+mnemonic+tune&oq=%22F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n%22+mnemonic+tune&gs_l=serp.3...3282.4032.1.4157.2.2.0.0.0.0.187.187.0j1.1.0.les%3B..0.0...1c.1.HT5ioJTcfZk&pbx=1&bav=on.2,or.r_gc.r_pw.r_qf.&fp=2b72666ff0e4cc03&bpcl=39650382&biw=740&bih=231 copies of this article]. In addition, it mixes Chinese and English words, so it carries the scent of "hey, I messed with words on the internet and got something to kind of match." In addition, the paragraph pointing at the Wu Xing article does not point out which associations are used on the Four Heavenly Kings, and reads as synthesis or worse, fanfiction, rather than reporting what any sources have said.[[User:KrytenKoro|Not even Mr. Lister's]] [[User_talk:KrytenKoro|Koromon survived intact.]] 16:05, 6 December 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External Links== *[http://japanesesymbolsofpresence.com/four%20heavenly%20kings.html The inner meaning of The Four Heavenly Kings] — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Walthersell|Walthersell]] ([[User talk:Walthersell|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Walthersell|contribs]]) 05:22, 12 April 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Tibetan == I'm not sure why we are prizing the appearance of the Tibetan alphabet, but there's no need to revert all the edits just to add four lines back in. THL is the romanisation of choice for pronunciation needs. The other definitions are legitimate: they are local pronunciations of the Sanskrit or Pali terms. [[User:Ogress|'''Ogress''']] [[User_Talk:Ogress|''smash!'']] 18:03, 31 May 2015 (UTC) :Also, the issue of is popping up; do we need to convert to {{gallery}}? Honestly I'm slightly intimidated but maybe I'll take a crack at it. :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == "Popular culture" == The "popular culture" section on this page seems to me to fall foul of [[MOS:POPCULT]], since 四天王 [https://legendsoflocalization.com/tricky-translations-2-the-four-heavenly-kings/ gets used in Japan to refer in general to groups of four things]. I had a go at writing something up about this to replace the existing list, but I wasn't confident in my ability to summarise in a way which clearly added to the article rather than just seeming like someone who's salty because they don't like Sailor Moon or whatever. [[Special:Contributions/176.27.87.86|176.27.87.86]] ([[User talk:176.27.87.86|talk]]) 18:59, 5 December 2019 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Baybayin == Is there any source for where the baybayin and "Tagalized" names come from? Because if they're simply Tagalized without anything, it has no place in this page. [[User:RayaOstrinsula|RayaOstrinsula]] ([[User talk:RayaOstrinsula|talk]]) 09:14, 7 September 2024 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>BaijiDolphin]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:en>Frietjes]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Four_Heavenly_Kings here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/53619304 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) 仏教の天部も「柱」と数えるのでしょうか？[[User:Stanislaus|Stanislaus]] 09:11 2004年1月21日 (UTC) ==○○の四天王について== 歴史的な事項で個々の項目を立てるとどうもぼやけるので、統合しませんか?[[User:Sat.K|Sat.K]] 2005年6月6日 (月) 14:18 (UTC) この記事はネタですか（笑） [[User:無空|無空]] 2005年6月11日 (土) 14:20 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 記事統合 == [[四大天王]]の記述は、すでに四天王で言及されている情報を多く含むため。特に四大天王では主に本記事で言及されている「香港四天王」を指しているようです。--[[User:BitBucket|BitBucket]] 2006年2月22日 (水) 00:54 (UTC) *(コメント)[[四天王]]と[[四大天王]]の何を統合したいのか不明です。[[四天王]]は仏教関係とその他、[[四大天王]]は芸能関係としっかり分けて記述されてますが？あえて言うなら中国語版のように統合より分割するべきでは？[[User:219.37.104.10|219.37.104.10]] 2006年3月11日 (土) 14:38 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 広目天の眷属について == 広目天の眷属は、毘舎闍（持国天の眷属「毘舎遮」と同じ）ではなく、富單那では？ 那伽は龍神、で、問題無いとは思いますが、基本的に八部鬼衆での表記は那伽が多いかと思います。 :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1244470553 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Buddhism|importance=Low}} {{WikiProject China|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=Low}} }} {{merged-from|Guardians of Buddhism|date=9 December 2014}} ==Untitled== How different are the Four Heavenly Kings from the Chinese [[Ssu Ling]]? I know that the Ssu Ling take up four of the five Chinese cardinal directions. Can we link these two? [[User:Hulamoth|Hulamoth]] 18:59, 6 May 2006 (UTC) :Very different. One is a set of mythical creatures. The other a set of deities. [[User:Yiren|Yik Lin Khoo]] 14 Aug 2006 :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == spread to korea? == guess they were never popular there..--[[User:Dangerous-Boy|Dangerous-Boy]] 08:38, 8 May 2006 (UTC) I've added the Korean names. I'm not used to Hangul, so I hope I got the transcriptions correct! [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 22:39, 10 May 2006 (UTC) :try looking at this: [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (Korea-related articles)]]--[[User:Dangerous-Boy|Dangerous-Boy]] 22:13, 14 May 2006 (UTC) ::Thanks to Appleby for fixing up the Korean transcriptions and adding Hangul. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 12:12, 17 May 2006 (UTC) :::no prob, nice little article here. these statues are indeed standard in korean buddhist temples. fyi, your transcriptions weren't wrong, but wikipedia's korean naming convention is to use a different romanization system. [[User:Appleby|Appleby]] 17:04, 17 May 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Merge == I disagree with the proposal to merge "Four Heavenly Kings" with "Guardians of the Directions". The two groups are quite distinct, having only one member in common. "Guardians of the Directions" is a primarily Hindu grouping of deities, and "Four Heavenly Kings" is a Buddhist grouping (although also used in non- or semi-Buddhist Chinese mythology). :Definitely true. While the Si Tianwang seem to have their roots in Hinduism, they are different in several ways--for one, there aren't even the same number. [[User:Fearwig|Fearwig]] 05:33, 11 May 2006 (UTC) As far as I can tell, the Ssu Ling is a different group as well. Obviously, there is a common theme to the concept of areal guardians, but it's not restricted to Asian religions and mythologies; it might as well include [[Norðri, Suðri, Austri and Vestri]] or the four [[Archangel]]s. Perhaps it deserves a category of its own or even a list page, especially if there are several additional examples. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 11:20, 10 May 2006 (UTC) As there doesn't seem to be a persuasive reason for merging the articles, I'll remove the merge flag.[[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 17:47, 11 May 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Otogi== Does anyone know if these four 'Gods' (or the Hindu versions for that matter) represent the four generals in the Otogi video games? :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Mahabhuta== The following was inserted after a remark about the association of the four Heavenly Kings with colors and directions: , although they may correspond to the concept of [[Mahabhuta]] That may be so, but it would be helpful to have some supporting information. I don't recall any association either between the Four Heavenly Kings and the four elements, or between the four elements and the directions (or colors). If there is such an association made somewhere, it's certainly appropriate to mention it, but citation is desirable so that the connection can be asserted more confidently.[[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 20:10, 15 October 2006 (UTC) :Fair enough. I have heard of an association between the colors yellow, red, blue, and white in relation to the classical elements in Buddhism on friesian.com (http://www.friesian.com/elements.htm), although I am not sure whether or not this is just thier opinion. [[User:66.24.236.62|66.24.236.62]] 01:41, 16 October 2006 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Devanagari== The Devanagari spellings used here are in serious error. They read: * Vaisravaṇa for Vaiśravaṇa * Kubhera for Kubera (and wrong form of "e" used) * Virūdhaka for Virūḍhaka * Dhrtarāśtra for Dhṛtarāṣṭra * Virupākśa for Virūpākṣa * Nothing for Vessavaṇa * Kuverā for Kuvera (wrong "e" again) * Virūlhaka for Virūḷhaka * Dhatarāththa for Dhatarattha * Virūpākhkha for Virūpakkha These are not minor mistakes. Unfortunately, I do not have the technical capacity to correct them, so I am commenting them out until they are fixed. [[User:RandomCritic|RandomCritic]] 15:06, 30 May 2007 (UTC) Also, using devanagari for Pali is arbitrary. It was never used before the 19th century, & is less used today than several other scripts. [[User:Peter jackson|Peter jackson]] ([[User talk:Peter jackson|talk]]) 08:35, 25 June 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Pokemon? == Should it be noted that in Pokemon,the japanese name for the Elite Four is "Four Heavenly Kings"? 17:10, 24 June 2009 (UTC) Perhaps if an 'in popular culture' section were added? Sailor Moon's first story arc (in most versions) also contained a group of characters named the Shitennou/Four Heavenly Kings, and there are likely more examples in other stories. [[Special:Contributions/67.252.14.109|67.252.14.109]] ([[User talk:67.252.14.109|talk]]) 13:02, 11 March 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Mnemonic == The Mnemonic is unsourced, and a google search reveals only [http://www.google.com/search?q=F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n+memnonic&sourceid=ie7&rls=com.microsoft:en-us:IE-SearchBox&ie=&oe=&safe=active#hl=en&safe=active&tbo=d&rls=com.microsoft:en-us%3AIE-SearchBox&sclient=psy-ab&q=%22F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n%22+mnemonic+tune&oq=%22F%C4%93ng+Ti%C3%A1o+Y%C7%94+Sh%C3%B9n%22+mnemonic+tune&gs_l=serp.3...3282.4032.1.4157.2.2.0.0.0.0.187.187.0j1.1.0.les%3B..0.0...1c.1.HT5ioJTcfZk&pbx=1&bav=on.2,or.r_gc.r_pw.r_qf.&fp=2b72666ff0e4cc03&bpcl=39650382&biw=740&bih=231 copies of this article]. In addition, it mixes Chinese and English words, so it carries the scent of "hey, I messed with words on the internet and got something to kind of match." In addition, the paragraph pointing at the Wu Xing article does not point out which associations are used on the Four Heavenly Kings, and reads as synthesis or worse, fanfiction, rather than reporting what any sources have said.[[User:KrytenKoro|Not even Mr. Lister's]] [[User_talk:KrytenKoro|Koromon survived intact.]] 16:05, 6 December 2012 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External Links== *[http://japanesesymbolsofpresence.com/four%20heavenly%20kings.html The inner meaning of The Four Heavenly Kings] — Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:Walthersell|Walthersell]] ([[User talk:Walthersell|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/Walthersell|contribs]]) 05:22, 12 April 2013 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Tibetan == I'm not sure why we are prizing the appearance of the Tibetan alphabet, but there's no need to revert all the edits just to add four lines back in. THL is the romanisation of choice for pronunciation needs. The other definitions are legitimate: they are local pronunciations of the Sanskrit or Pali terms. [[User:Ogress|'''Ogress''']] [[User_Talk:Ogress|''smash!'']] 18:03, 31 May 2015 (UTC) :Also, the issue of is popping up; do we need to convert to {{gallery}}? Honestly I'm slightly intimidated but maybe I'll take a crack at it. :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == "Popular culture" == The "popular culture" section on this page seems to me to fall foul of [[MOS:POPCULT]], since 四天王 [https://legendsoflocalization.com/tricky-translations-2-the-four-heavenly-kings/ gets used in Japan to refer in general to groups of four things]. I had a go at writing something up about this to replace the existing list, but I wasn't confident in my ability to summarise in a way which clearly added to the article rather than just seeming like someone who's salty because they don't like Sailor Moon or whatever. [[Special:Contributions/176.27.87.86|176.27.87.86]] ([[User talk:176.27.87.86|talk]]) 18:59, 5 December 2019 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Baybayin == Is there any source for where the baybayin and "Tagalized" names come from? Because if they're simply Tagalized without anything, it has no place in this page. [[User:RayaOstrinsula|RayaOstrinsula]] ([[User talk:RayaOstrinsula|talk]]) 09:14, 7 September 2024 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:24, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
